channel.title: caylaclark8
channel.description: Email: blinddateavl@gmail.com for collabs and restaurant reviews!

item.title: CAPTION: As it turns out, the term “fertility specialist” is...
item.description:
CAPTION: As it turns out, the term “fertility specialist” isn’t legally protected, meaning anyone can slap it on a business card, no credentials necessary. Sadly, because women’s reproductive health is treated like an afterthought (at best), emotional exploitation frequently gets piled on top of an already impossible journey. It’s not necessarily a gap in the system, because confusion is profitable. When women don’t know what’s normal, what to expect, or who’s actually qualified to help, anyone with a convincing pitch can step in to “help.”
#fertility #fertilityjourney #ivfjourney #womenshealth
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
